pkgmetadata.longdescription: Upstream's GitHub repository (github.com/newville/ifeffit) was deleted on 2026-04-23; the author's maintained successor is Larch, packaged as sci-physics/xraylarch. This ebuild ships 1.2.11d.orig.tar.gz as preserved in the Ubuntu archive (the only host that still serves it; SourceForge's files area stops at 1.2.11c). The sourceforge remote-id below points at the original project page that predates the github move.
